title: angophora costata subsp. costata
intro: Angophora costata subsp. costata, also known as Smooth-barked Apple or Smooth-barked Angophora, is a subspecies of tree native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Angophora costata subsp. costata include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
